messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 請問你是陳月美小姐嗎？
messages.py: Qǐngwèn nǐ shì Chén Yuèměi xiǎojiě ma?
messages.en: Excuse me, are you Miss Chen Yuemei?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Shìde. Xièxiè nǐ lái jiē wǒmen.
messages.en: Yes. Thank you for coming to pick us up.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Búkèqì. Wǒ shì Lǐ Mínghuá.
messages.en: You are welcome. I am Li Minghua.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Zhè shì Wáng xiānshēng.
messages.en: This is Mr. Wang.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Nǐhǎo, wǒ xìng Wáng, jiào Kāiwén.
messages.en: How are you? My surname is Wang, my name is Kaiwen.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 你們好。歡迎你們來臺灣。
messages.py: Nǐmen hǎo. Huānyíng nǐmen lái Táiwān.
messages.en: How are you? Welcome to Taiwan.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Lǐ xiānshēng, nǐ shì Táiwān rén ma?
messages.en: Mr. Li, are you Taiwanese?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 是，我是臺灣人。王先生，你是哪國人？
messages.py: Shì, wǒ shì Táiwān rén. Wáng xiānshēng, nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
messages.en: Yes, I am Taiwanese. Mr. Wang, what country are you from?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 我是美國人。陳小姐，你呢？你是哪國人？
messages.py: Wǒ shì Měiguó rén. Chén xiǎojiě, nǐ ne? Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
messages.en: I am American. Miss Chen, how about you? What country are you from?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Wǒ shì Yuènán rén.
messages.en: I am Vietnamese.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 李先生，王先生，我們喜歡喝茶。臺灣人呢？
messages.py: Lǐ xiānshēng, Wáng xiānshēng, wǒmen xǐhuān hē chá. Táiwān rén ne?
messages.en: Mr. Li, Mr. Wang, we like to drink tea. What about Taiwanese people?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Táiwān rén yě xǐhuān hē chá.
messages.en: Taiwanese people also like to drink tea.

vocabulary.en: to be called (by the name of)

exercises.title: Speaking Practice
exercises.content: Practice reading Dialogue 1 out loud, focusing on the greeting phrases.

exercises.title: Vocabulary Drill
exercises.content: Cover the Pinyin and English columns. Try to read the Chinese characters and state their meaning.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Mínghuá, zhè shì shéi de xiàngpiàn?
messages.en: Minghua, whose picture is this?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Zhè shì wǒ jiārén de xiàngpiàn.
messages.en: This is a picture of my family.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Zhège rén shì shéi?
messages.en: Who is this person?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 這是我爸爸，那是我媽媽。
messages.py: Zhè shì wǒ bàba, nà shì wǒ māma.
messages.en: This is my dad, that is my mom.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Zhè shì nǐ gēge ma?
messages.en: Is this your older brother?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Bú shì, tā shì wǒ dìdi.
messages.en: No, he is my younger brother.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Nà shì nǐ mèimei ma?
messages.en: Is that your younger sister?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Shì, nà shì wǒmen mèimei.
messages.en: Yes, that is our younger sister.

dialogues.title: Dialogue 1: What do you do on weekends?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 開文，你週末喜歡做什麼？
messages.py: Kāiwén, nǐ zhōumò xǐhuān zuò shénme?
messages.en: Kaiwen, what do you like to do on weekends?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 我喜歡打網球，也喜歡看書。你呢？
messages.py: Wǒ xǐhuān dǎ wǎngqiú, yě xǐhuān kàn shū. Nǐ ne?
messages.en: I like playing tennis, and also like reading. How about you?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 我喜歡看電視，也喜歡聽音樂。
messages.py: Wǒ xǐhuān kàn diànshì, yě xǐhuān tīng yīnyuè.
messages.en: I like watching TV, and also like listening to music.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Nǐ xǐhuān bù xǐhuān dǎ bàngqiú?
messages.en: Do you like to play baseball?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Bù xǐhuān, wǒ bú huì dǎ bàngqiú.
messages.en: No, I do not know how to play baseball.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 我們這個週末去打網球，好嗎？
messages.py: Wǒmen zhège zhōumò qù dǎ wǎngqiú, hǎo ma?
messages.en: Shall we go play tennis this weekend?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Hǎo a!
messages.en: Okay!

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 明華，你跟我們一起去，好不好？
messages.py: Mínghuá, nǐ gēn wǒmen yìqǐ qù, hǎo bù hǎo?
messages.en: Minghua, you go with us, alright?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Kěshì wǒ bú huì dǎ wǎngqiú.
messages.en: But I do not know how to play tennis.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Méi guānxi, wǒmen jiāo nǐ.
messages.en: It does not matter, we will teach you.

vocabulary.en: to look, to read, to watch

exercises.title: TTS Practice
exercises.content: Click the 🔊 icon next to each chat bubble to practice your listening and pronunciation!

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Lǎobǎn, qǐngwèn xīguā zěnme mài?
messages.en: Boss, excuse me, how are the watermelons sold?

messages.speaker: 老闆
messages.py: Yì jīn sānshí kuài.
messages.en: 30 dollars a catty.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Mángguǒ ne?
messages.en: What about mangoes?

messages.speaker: 老闆
messages.ch: 一斤五十塊。你要買什麼？
messages.py: Yì jīn wǔshí kuài. Nǐ yào mǎi shénme?
messages.en: 50 dollars a catty. What do you want to buy?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 我要買一個西瓜，三個芒果。
messages.py: Wǒ yào mǎi yí ge xīguā, sān ge mángguǒ.
messages.en: I want to buy one watermelon and three mangoes.

messages.speaker: 老闆
messages.ch: 西瓜一百二十塊，芒果一百五十塊。
messages.py: Xīguā yìbǎi èrshí kuài, mángguǒ yìbǎi wǔshí kuài.
messages.en: Watermelon is 120 dollars, mangoes are 150 dollars.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Yígòng duōshǎo qián?
messages.en: How much in total?

messages.speaker: 老闆
messages.py: Yígòng èrbǎi qīshí kuài.
messages.en: 270 dollars in total.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Zhè shì sānbǎi kuài.
messages.en: Here is 300 dollars.

messages.speaker: 老闆
messages.py: Zhǎo nǐ sānshí kuài. Xièxiè.
messages.en: Here is 30 dollars change. Thank you.

exercises.title: Speaking
exercises.content: Practice the buying and selling dialogue.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 請問你們有什麼好吃的？
messages.py: Qǐngwèn nǐmen yǒu shénme hǎochī de?
messages.en: Excuse me, what delicious food do you have?

messages.speaker: 服務生
messages.py: Wǒmen de niúròumiàn hěn hǎochī.
messages.en: Our beef noodles are very delicious.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Hǎo, wǒ yào yì wǎn niúròumiàn.
messages.en: Okay, I want a bowl of beef noodles.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 我不吃牛。有沒有豬肉麵？
messages.py: Wǒ bù chī niú. Yǒu méiyǒu zhūròumiàn?
messages.en: I do not eat beef. Do you have pork noodles?

messages.speaker: 服務生
messages.py: Yǒu, zhūròumiàn yě hěn hǎochī.
messages.en: Yes, the pork noodles are also very delicious.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 開文，你的牛肉麵好吃嗎？
messages.py: Kāiwén, nǐ de niúròumiàn hǎochī ma?
messages.en: Kaiwen, are your beef noodles delicious?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Zhēn hǎochī! Nǐ de ne?
messages.en: Really delicious! What about yours?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Wǒ de zhūròumiàn yě búcuò.
messages.en: My pork noodles are also not bad.

exercises.title: Roleplay
exercises.content: Act out the restaurant scene with a friend.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 開文，你們的學校在哪裡？
messages.py: Kāiwén, nǐmen de xuéxiào zài nǎlǐ?
messages.en: Kaiwen, where is your school?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 我們學校在山上。風景很漂亮。
messages.py: Wǒmen xuéxiào zài shān shàng. Fēngjǐng hěn piàoliang.
messages.en: Our school is on the mountain. The scenery is very beautiful.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Nàlǐ yuǎn bù yuǎn?
messages.en: Is it far there?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Bú tài yuǎn.
messages.en: Not too far.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 明天是週末，我們去唱歌好嗎？
messages.py: Míngtiān shì zhōumò, wǒmen qù chànggē hǎo ma?
messages.en: Tomorrow is the weekend, shall we go singing?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Hǎo a, qù nǎlǐ chàng?
messages.en: Okay, where to sing?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Wǒmen qù KTV chàng.
messages.en: We will go to KTV to sing.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒmen jǐ diǎn qù?
messages.en: What time are we going?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Zǎoshang jiǔ diǎn, zěnmeyàng?
messages.en: 9 AM, how about that?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Kāiwén, nǐ zhōumò qù nǎlǐ?
messages.en: Kaiwen, where are you going this weekend?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ yào qù Táinán.
messages.en: I am going to Tainan.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Nǐ zěnme qù?
messages.en: How are you getting there?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ zuò huǒchē qù.
messages.en: I will take the train.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Zuò huǒchē yào duōjiǔ?
messages.en: How long does the train take?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Yào sì ge xiǎoshí.
messages.en: It takes four hours.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 下個月放假，你們想去哪裡玩？
messages.py: Xià ge yuè fàngjià, nǐmen xiǎng qù nǎlǐ wán?
messages.en: Next month is a holiday, where do you guys want to go play?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ xiǎng qù Huālián.
messages.en: I want to go to Hualien.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Huālián hěn hǎowán.
messages.en: Hualien is very fun.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Wǒmen kěyǐ zū chē qù ma?
messages.en: Can we rent a car to go?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Hǎo, wǒmen zū chē qù.
messages.en: Okay, we will rent a car.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Táiwān de shuǐguǒ zhēn duō!
messages.en: Taiwan has so much fruit!

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Duì, zhèlǐ de shuǐguǒ hěn hǎochī.
messages.en: Yes, the fruit here is very delicious.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Nǐ zuì xǐhuān chī shénme shuǐguǒ?
messages.en: What is your favorite fruit?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ zuì xǐhuān chī xīguā, nǐ ne?
messages.en: I like eating watermelon the most, what about you?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Wǒ bǐjiào xǐhuān chī mángguǒ.
messages.en: I prefer eating mangoes.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 明華，我想在學校附近租房子。
messages.py: Mínghuá, wǒ xiǎng zài xuéxiào fùjìn zū fángzi.
messages.en: Minghua, I want to rent a house near the school.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Nǐ yào zū shénmeyàng de fángzi?
messages.en: What kind of house do you want to rent?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ yào zū yì jiān tàofáng.
messages.en: I want to rent a studio apartment.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Yí ge yuè duōshǎo qián?
messages.en: How much per month?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Yí wàn kuài zuǒyòu.
messages.en: Around ten thousand dollars.

12.title: 你在臺灣學多久的中文

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.ch: 開文，你在臺灣學多久的中文了？
messages.py: Kāiwén, nǐ zài Táiwān xué duōjiǔ de Zhōngwén le?
messages.en: Kaiwen, how long have you been studying Chinese in Taiwan?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ xué le liù ge yuè le.
messages.en: I have studied for six months.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Nǐ juéde Zhōngwén nán bù nán?
messages.en: Do you feel Chinese is difficult?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.ch: 我覺得說中文不難，可是寫漢字很難。
messages.py: Wǒ juéde shuō Zhōngwén bù nán, kěshì xiě Hànzì hěn nán.
messages.en: I think speaking Chinese is not hard, but writing Chinese characters is very hard.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 明華，今天是你的生日嗎？
messages.py: Mínghuá, jīntiān shì nǐ de shēngrì ma?
messages.en: Minghua, is today your birthday?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Duì, jīntiān shì wǒ de shēngrì.
messages.en: Yes, today is my birthday.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.ch: 祝你生日快樂！這個送給你。
messages.py: Zhù nǐ shēngrì kuàilè! Zhège sòng gěi nǐ.
messages.en: Happy birthday to you! This is for you.

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Xièxiè nǐ! Zhè shì shénme?
messages.en: Thank you! What is this?

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Zhè shì yì běn shū.
messages.en: This is a book.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Jīntiān tiānqì zhème lěng!
messages.en: The weather is so cold today!

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Shì a, kuàiyào xiàyǔ le.
messages.en: Yes, it's about to rain.

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Nǐ dài sǎn le ma?
messages.en: Did you bring an umbrella?

messages.speaker: 明華
messages.py: Wǒ dài le. Wǒmen kuài diǎn zǒu ba.
messages.en: I brought one. Let's walk faster.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Nǐ zěnme le?
messages.en: What is wrong with you?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ hěn bù shūfú, tóu hěn tòng.
messages.en: I feel very uncomfortable, my head hurts a lot.

messages.speaker: 月美
messages.py: Nǐ shì bú shì gǎnmào le?
messages.en: Did you catch a cold?

messages.speaker: 開文
messages.py: Wǒ xiǎng shì. Wǒ yào qù kàn yīshēng.
messages.en: I think so. I need to go see a doctor.
